hero.label: Grants & Funding
hero.title: You have the vision.
hero.intro: Fundfinder helps mission-driven organisations with strategic clarity, grant matching and applications. From vision to plan in one day — with an AI workflow that produces sharp, specific applications. Not generic work.

pressure_cooker.label: Pressure Cooker Format
pressure_cooker.title: One day. From vision to grant plan.
pressure_cooker.description: In a single working day we build a custom AI grant finder for your organisation, scan the funding landscape, and write a complete grant plan including budget. Ready to submit.

cards.title: Intake & Custom AI
cards.description: Your organisation, mission and sector — mapped out sharply. We immediately build a custom AI grant finder that knows your profile.

cards.title: Research & Matching
cards.description: AI-powered scan of the funding landscape. The three most relevant grants with match scores, deadlines and requirements.

cards.title: Complete Plan
cards.description: Tailored grant plan: narrative, budget and path to submission. The only thing left to do afterwards is submit.

deliverables: Talk to the Hand interview setup
Custom GPT build (owned by Super Stories, used as internal tool and in online calls with you)
Potential funds mapped out, shared in a Google Doc
Selection of number and type of applications
Complete plan including iterations and adjustments
terms: Payment follows after approval of the plan, before submission to the fund
This rate applies to the first application. Each subsequent application costs 4–8 hours depending on complexity. An application in two parts counts as two applications
All information provided is treated confidentially — this engagement confirmation serves as NDA
Feedback on your application is shared with our system, making it smarter. This knowledge benefits other applicants anonymously — and your own subsequent applications

waarom.label: Why this works
waarom.title: Sharp through AI and depth.
waarom.description: The pressure cooker works because we combine three things other agencies don't. The result: not generic applications, but sharp ones — in a fraction of the time and at a fraction of the price.

cards.title: Talk to the Hand
cards.description: Before we write anything, we listen. Talk to the Hand is our own voice-first interview tool — we hear your organisation in your own words, not through a filled-in template. That's where the sharpest passages of the application come from.

cards.title: AI-driven fund scouting
cards.description: Our AI workflow scans the funding landscape by sector, stage and deadline. Where a traditional agency needs days for a long-list, we do it in hours — and deeper.

cards.title: 30 years of domain expertise
cards.description: 30 years of direct experience in three domains: culture, B2B (especially textiles & fibres) and mental health. Plus a broad antenna for innovation. That means: your story lands with the right funds, in the right language.

waarom.closing: This is why we can charge €495–€895 per day instead of €2,000–€8,000 per application. AI gives leverage. Experience gives sharpness. Substance matters.

wat_krijgt.label: What you get — and what you don't
wat_krijgt.title: Clear expectation management.
included: Strategic clarity about your position and opportunities
Custom AI grant finder built for your organisation
Top 3 grants matched to your profile
Complete grant plan with narrative and budget — ready to submit
Honest advice on feasibility — even if that means 'no'
One point of contact, senior level, no juniors
excluded: No beautifully designed document — substance over styling
No endless meeting cycles — we work in sprints
No guarantee of award — but maximum chance
No execution of your project — we write, you do
No account management — you get tools to continue on your own

together.label: We are in this together
together.title: Success is always built together.
together.description: We deliver the plan, the strategy and the application. But the best results come when you're also in the game. A good client checks data directly with the funding body, schedules a preparatory meeting when possible, and builds strategic visibility through LinkedIn or their own network.

cards.title: You provide feedback
cards.description: In contact with the fund? Informal feedback before submission is worth its weight in gold. It makes your application stronger and our system smarter.

cards.title: You build visibility
cards.description: Strategic LinkedIn content, activate your network, tell your story. Funds google you — make sure they find something.

cards.title: We learn along
cards.description: Every interaction with a fund — award, rejection, informal conversation — feeds back into your custom AI. The next application is always better.

doorlopend.label: After the pressure cooker
doorlopend.title: Fundfinder is part of Super Stories.
doorlopend.description: Fundfinder focuses on grant scouting and grant plans. An ongoing grant strategy sometimes requires assets or supporting services outside this scope — we arrange those through the broader Super Stories ecosystem. Want to know more? Let's talk.

cards.title: Ongoing Support
cards.description: 2 hours per month of strategic sparring and review. Additional hours at standard rate: €150/hour.
cards.note: This model incentivises efficiency on both sides. You come prepared, we deliver maximum value per hour.

cards.title: Every Additional Grant Application
cards.description: Complete application including narrative, budget and appendices. Estimated: 4–8 hours, depending on complexity and always in consultation. Success fee only upon award.

vliegwiel.label: The flywheel
vliegwiel.title: A system that gets smarter with every application.

steps.title: Custom AI
steps.description: We build a grant finder that knows your organisation, mission and sector. It gets smarter with every interaction.

steps.title: Application
steps.description: We write the application together — informed by patterns from previous trajectories across all clients.

steps.title: Feedback
steps.description: Award, rejection, or informal feedback from the fund — everything feeds back into the system.

steps.title: Pattern recognition
steps.description: After every application, the next one gets better. Per fund, per sector, per application type. That's our flywheel — and your advantage.

items.name: Lichting 2026
items.description: Grant strategy & fund applications for a 20-year fashion platform

items.name: Denim City
items.description: Grant strategy for the House of Denim ecosystem — Foundation and BV

intake.label: Intake
intake.title: Start here.
intake.description: Fill in the form below. The more complete, the better we can prepare for your pressure cooker. We'll reply within 48 hours by email.
intake.submitted_text: We'll send you an email within 48 hours to schedule the pressure cooker.
